text.title: Market Sizing with AI Research Tools Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Are stakes >= $10k AND public market figures exist?

conclusion.verdict: Use rough estimate; do not run full triangulation.
Switch to bottom-up via 1-1 expert interviews.

branch.when: stakes >= 10000 AND public_figures == true AND tools_available == true

conclusion.verdict: Run all three methods; reconcile spread.

branch.when: stakes >= 10000 AND public_figures == true AND tools_available == false

conclusion.verdict: Onboard tool first; methodology cannot operate without recency-capable search.
